fleet.fleet_a_archetype_id: Fleet A archetype top-level key in archetypes_v1_5.json (or 'default').
fleet.fleet_b_archetype_id: Fleet B archetype top-level key in archetypes_v1_5.json (or 'default').
fleet.initial_fleet_aspect_ratio: Initial formation col/row ratio. Example: 2.0 means wider than tall.

unit.attack_range: Combat hit range (distance threshold). Phase V governance default is 5.0.
unit.damage_per_tick: Base attack damage per successful hit event.
unit.unit_max_hit_points: Initial and max HP per unit.

battlefield.background_map_seed: Background map seed (stars/planet/asteroid field). If -1, use true randomness.
battlefield.min_unit_spacing: Minimum initial physical spacing and movement separation radius. Recommended default=2.0; density stress mode=1.0.

run_control.display_language: Label language for plot names: 'EN' or 'ZH'.
run_control.max_time_steps: Maximum simulation ticks. If <=0, run until first fleet elimination +10 ticks, capped at 999 ticks.
run_control.random_seed: General visualization seed (non-map). If -1, use true randomness.
run_control.observer_enabled: Observer diagnostics switch. true enables observer/shadow diagnostics and applies observer plot profile in fixed order: rho -> Cohesion(C_v3) -> C_conn -> C_scale -> C_attrition -> C Margin (slots 03/04/05/06/07/08). false keeps battle behavior unchanged and auto-hides observer-only slots (03/05/06/07).
run_control.export_battle_report: Battle report export switch. true writes BRF markdown to analysis/exports/battle_reports/YYYYMMDD/ with theme-scoped timestamped filename.

runtime.fire_quality_alpha: Directional fire-quality coefficient alpha. 0.0 disables directional effect; 0.1 is current recommended default.
runtime.alpha_safe_max: Documented safe upper bound for fire_quality_alpha: 0.15 (governance note).
runtime.contact_hysteresis_h: Contact hysteresis band ratio h. Runtime clamp is [0.0, 0.2]. h<=0 disables CH.
runtime.fsr_strength: FSR per-tick relaxation strength. Runtime clamp is [0.0, 0.3]. fsr_strength<=0 disables FSR.
runtime.boundary_enabled: Enable boundary mechanisms as a pair (soft + hard clamp). true=both ON, false=both OFF. Default false for DOE/general runs.

visualization.auto_zoom_2d: Auto zoom battlefield view during animation (update every 50 ticks; true/false).
visualization.unit_direction_mode: Unit arrow direction mode: effective=post-projection displacement; free=pre-projection composite vector; attack=current attack-target direction (fallback effective if no target); composite=angle-bisector of attack and effective (fallback effective if no target).
visualization.show_attack_target_lines: Visual-only toggle. Draw thin red lines each frame from attacker center (post-tick position) to current target center (post-tick position).
visualization.tick_plots_follow_battlefield_tick: Visual-only toggle. If true, all tick-based plots unfold progressively with Battlefield tick; if false, full trajectories are shown immediately.
visualization.animation_play_speed: Animation playback speed multiplier. 1.0 is baseline (historical default equals 100ms/frame when interval=100).
visualization.animation_frame_interval_ms: Base animation playback interval per rendered frame in milliseconds (before play-speed multiplier).
visualization.print_tick_summary: Print per-tick summary logs to console.

export_video.enabled: Video export switch. false keeps current interactive-only behavior.
export_video.full_plot: true=export full figure layout; false=export Battlefield-only square video (side=height_px).
export_video.output_path: Output video root path or file prefix. Relative paths are resolved from workspace root; runtime appends timestamp automatically.
export_video.fps: Export FPS for encoded video. Independent from simulation tick rate.
export_video.bitrate_kbps: Target bitrate in kbps for encoded video.
export_video.width_px: Output video width in pixels. Default 1920.
export_video.height_px: Output video height in pixels. Default 1080.
export_video.dpi: Render DPI used during animation export. width_px/dpi and height_px/dpi define figure size during export.
